title: Mediterranean Stir-Fry
description: A quick and flavorful stir-fry with a Mediterranean twist, perfect for a weeknight dinner. The rich flavors of the Mediterranean come together with the crunch of collards for a delicious and healthy meal.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add collard greens and cook for 3-4 minutes, until slightly wilted.
Sprinkle with Mediterranean seasoning and season with salt and pepper.
Serve hot, garnished with additional seasoning if desired.
